description: Create a nightly GitHub Actions workflow named Push Binary Nightly that runs daily at 10:45 AM and on manual dispatch. The workflow should have two jobs: build_on_cpu and test_on_gpu. The build_on_cpu job should run on a linux.2xlarge instance with a matrix of Python versions 3.7, 3.8, and 3.9, and install dependencies, build FBGEMM_GPU, and upload the wheel as a GHA artifact. The test_on_gpu job should run on a linux.4xlarge.nvidia.gpu instance with the same matrix of Python versions, download the wheel from GHA, install dependencies, test FBGEMM_GPU, and push the binary to PyPI.
